seoTitle: West End vs West Fitzgerald — Climate Risk Comparison | ClimateNest
seoDescription: Compare climate risk scores between West End and West Fitzgerald. See which suburb is safer from flood, bushfire, heat, and storm hazards.
ogTitle: West End vs West Fitzgerald: Climate Safety
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in West End and West Fitzgerald.
heading: West End vs West Fitzgerald — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between West End, Western Australia and West Fitzgerald, Western Australia. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: West Fitzgerald has a lower overall climate risk score (34/100) compared to West End (36/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is West End or West Fitzgerald safer from flooding?
faq.answer: West End has a flood risk score of 46/100, while West Fitzgerald scores 44/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: West End scores 51/100 for bushfire risk. West Fitzgerald scores 28/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in West End or West Fitzgerald?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. West Fitzgerald has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 0.95% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
